text.text:
*AI WEEKLY SIGNALS — 4–10 MAY 2026*

*Adoption:*
— :tada: AI-assisted hosted events: *25.0%* (WoW +1.8pp). 12-week climb: 18.1% → 25.0%. All-time high.
— Prompts per user (Slides Agent): *3.4* (WoW +0.3). 4w trend: trending up.

*Satisfaction:*
— :warning: Slides Agent CSAT: 74.5% (WoW -4.0pp), n=55. -6.0pp vs 4w avg of 80.6%.
— Slides Agent top comment: _"not useful"_ — said 4 times this week (of 7 comments).
— Presentation Review CSAT: 50.0% (n=4 — too sparse to read).

*Reliability:*
— Slides Agent failure-refreshes: flat WoW, trending down over 4w — good direction.
— Upload failure rate: down 0.8pp WoW, holding steady over 4w — good direction.

*Notable:*
— AI-assist rate hits an all-time high at *25.0%* — the 12-week climb from 18.1% has resumed after April's plateau, and adoption depth follows: prompts-per-user up to *3.4*, trending up against the 4w mean.
— Slides Agent CSAT slipped to *74.5%* on n=55 — 6pp below the 4w average, dislikes ticked up to 14. Top free-text comment was _"not useful"_ (4 of 7) — a small but consistent signal worth poking at.
— Reliability is the one piece of good news everywhere: failure-refreshes flat and well below 4w trend, upload failure rate steady at ~3.6%. Nothing exciting to report there, which is the point.
— Presentation Review CSAT is essentially unreadable this week (n=4); the recent run of weekly samples has been thin enough that we should treat the number as noise until volume recovers.
